fields.Name: HubSpot
fields.Description: HubSpot CRM integration for syncing contacts, companies, deals, and activities

fields.Name: contacts
fields.Description: CRM contacts with personal, professional, and lifecycle information

fields.Name: companies
fields.Description: CRM companies with organization details and firmographic data

fields.Name: deals
fields.Description: Sales deals and opportunities with pipeline and stage tracking

fields.Name: tickets
fields.Description: Support tickets with pipeline, priority, and category tracking

fields.Name: products
fields.Description: Product catalog with pricing, SKU, and billing information

fields.Name: line_items
fields.Description: Individual line items associated with deals, including pricing and product details

fields.Name: quotes
fields.Description: Sales quotes with pricing, sender details, and expiration tracking

fields.Name: calls
fields.Description: Logged phone calls with duration, direction, and recording details

fields.Name: emails
fields.Description: Logged email activities with sender, recipient, and content details

fields.Name: notes
fields.Description: Notes and annotations attached to CRM records

fields.Name: tasks
fields.Description: To-do tasks with status, priority, and completion tracking

fields.Name: meetings
fields.Description: Scheduled meetings with time, location, outcome, and notes

fields.Name: feedback_submissions
fields.Description: Customer feedback survey responses with sentiment and channel data

fields.Name: assoc_contacts_companies
fields.Description: Many-to-many associations between contacts and companies

fields.Name: assoc_contacts_deals
fields.Description: Many-to-many associations between contacts and deals

fields.Name: assoc_contacts_tickets
fields.Description: Many-to-many associations between contacts and support tickets

fields.Name: assoc_companies_deals
fields.Description: Many-to-many associations between companies and deals

fields.Name: assoc_companies_tickets
fields.Description: Many-to-many associations between companies and support tickets

fields.Name: assoc_deals_line_items
fields.Description: Many-to-many associations between deals and line items

fields.Name: assoc_deals_quotes
fields.Description: Many-to-many associations between deals and quotes

fields.Name: assoc_quotes_contacts
fields.Description: Many-to-many associations between quotes and contacts

fields.Name: assoc_quotes_line_items
fields.Description: Many-to-many associations between quotes and line items

fields.Description: Associations between contacts and logged calls

fields.Name: assoc_contacts_emails
fields.Description: Associations between contacts and logged emails

fields.Description: Associations between companies and logged calls

fields.Name: assoc_companies_emails
fields.Description: Associations between companies and logged emails

fields.Name: assoc_deals_calls
fields.Description: Associations between deals and logged calls

fields.Name: assoc_deals_emails
fields.Description: Associations between deals and logged emails

fields.Description: Associations between tickets and logged calls
